description: You are a regional epidemiologist. Configure this Chrome workspace for secure outbreak surveillance following the SOP at ~/Desktop/epi_workspace_sop.txt. Your tasks include removing personal/entertainment bookmarks, organizing epidemiological bookmarks into 'Global Health', 'Federal & State', and 'Genomic & Academic' folders on the bookmark bar, and downloading foundational datasets from http://localhost:8080 to ~/Documents/Surveillance_Data/. Additionally, secure the environment by disabling password saving, address autofill, and payment methods. Enable the '#enable-gpu-rasterization' and '#ignore-gpu-blocklist' flags for GIS mapping, and set the browser to open https://promedmail.org and https://www.cdc.gov on startup.
